name: Blueberry Crumb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in egg and milk, mixing well after each addition.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Gently fold in the blueberries, dusting them lightly with flour before adding.
7. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-inch square baking pan.
8. For the topping, mix together sugar, flour, and cinnamon in a separate bowl.
9. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
10. Sprinkle the crumb topping evenly over the cake batter.
11. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
12. Allow to cool before serving.
